auth.title: DKV@Home Sign in
auth.description:
⚠️ Important: ALWAYS open the login link directly from this form – never use a saved or browser-history URL!

Set up block rule (first time only):
1) F12 → Network tab → open "Request conditions" tab at the bottom (if not visible: click "+" next to Console → "Network request blocking").
2) Check "Enable blocking and throttling" → click "+" → enter https://my.dkv-mobility.com/dashboard* → Enter.

Sign in:
3) Click the following link directly:
{auth_url}
4) Sign in. The browser will show an error page – that is correct!
5) Copy the URL from the address bar (contains ?code=…) and paste it above.

Afterwards: DevTools → Request conditions → uncheck "Enable blocking".

reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect DKV@Home
reauth_confirm.description:
⚠️ Important: ALWAYS open the login link directly from this form – never use a saved or browser-history URL!

Set up block rule (first time only):
1) F12 → Network tab → open "Request conditions" tab at the bottom (if not visible: click "+" next to Console → "Network request blocking").
2) Check "Enable blocking and throttling" → click "+" → enter https://my.dkv-mobility.com/dashboard* → Enter.

Sign in:
3) Click the following link directly:
{auth_url}
4) Sign in. The browser will show an error page – that is correct!
5) Copy the URL from the address bar (contains ?code=…) and paste it above.

Afterwards: DevTools → Request conditions → uncheck "Enable blocking".

error.cannot_connect: Connection failed. Make sure the dashboard URL was blocked in DevTools BEFORE opening the login link.
error.wrong_auth_url: Wrong login link used. Please click the link FROM THE FORM below – do not use a saved or previously copied URL from your browser!
error.invalid_input: Invalid input. Please paste the full redirect URL (with ?code=…) or a refresh token (starts with 'eyJ').
error.invalid_redirect_url: No authorization code found in the URL. Please paste the full redirect URL.
error.unknown: Unknown error. Check the HA logs for details.
